HomeAboutServicesPricingHelpContact Customer Login

Family-Owned. Disability-Led. Solar-Powered Future.

We're two people in Park City, Kansas building the IT company we wish had existed — for the businesses Big Tech overlooks and the seniors technology left behind.

Our Mission

Why We Exist

To replace expensive, fragmented SaaS stacks with AI-built custom apps, deliver White Glove IT care to the clients Big Tech ignores, and build toward a 100% solar-powered, ADA-accessible, family-owned facility in Park City, Kansas.

"Local, sovereign, sustainable technology is not just possible — it's better."

Kecktech is the IT partner that treats every client like a neighbor — whether that's an overwhelmed small business owner, a senior trying to stay safe online, or a company tired of paying $1,200 a month for tools they barely use.

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

🧑‍💼

Human-First

Technology serves people — not the other way around. Every decision we make starts with the human on the other end, especially the ones Big Tech has historically left behind.

🛡️

Sovereign & Private

Your data stays in Kansas, on our servers, under your terms. We don't sell it, scan it, or profit from it — privacy is a feature, not an upsell.

☀️

Solar & Circular

We're committed to 100% solar operations. Our planned 25kW rooftop array is a core business goal — and every device in our HaaS fleet is already responsibly refurbished.

♿

Radically Accessible

ADA-first in everything: our software, our process, and our team — and in the facility we're building. Accessibility is in the blueprint, not bolted on after the fact.

🤝

White Glove

Real humans, real accountability, real care. No offshore call centers, no ticket queues — the same people answer every time, with patience and dignity.

Meet the Team

The Founders

Jon Keck

Co-Founder & Lead Engineer

30+ years of enterprise IT experience. Jon built the infrastructure that powers Kecktech — from the vision of a solar-powered data center to the AI pipelines in the code. He believes the best IT support is the kind you barely notice.

(316) 768-0034 support@kecktech.net
Our Big Goal

Help Us Build It

Our dream is a 1,500 sq ft purpose-built solar-powered data center in Park City, Kansas — 25kW array, 100kWh battery backup, ADA-accessible, family-owned, and 100% off-grid. We're raising funds to make it real.

25kW Planned Solar Array
100kWh Battery Goal
1,500 ft² Target Facility
$250K Funding Goal

Support the Build

Every dollar goes directly toward the solar facility. Help us build sovereign, sustainable infrastructure for small businesses and seniors across Kansas.

Donate via PayPal ↗
